mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_PARAGRAPH_SET ( MEMBER_ID, FOLDER_ID, SET_NAME, DESCRIPTION, DISPLAY_ORDER, IS_ACTIVE ) VALUES ( #{memberId}, #{folderId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{setName}, #{description, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{displayOrder}, #{isActive} )
mapper.sql: ps.PARAGRAPH_SET_ID, ps.FOLDER_ID, f.FOLDER_NAME AS folderName, ps.SET_NAME, ps.DESCRIPTION, ps.DISPLAY_ORDER, ps.IS_ACTIVE, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_PARAGRAPH p WHERE p.PARAGRAPH_SET_ID = ps.PARAGRAPH_SET_ID AND p.MEMBER_ID = ps.MEMBER_ID AND p.IS_ACTIVE = 'Y' ) AS paragraphCount, ps.CREATED_AT, ps.UPDATED_AT
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM TB_PARAGRAPH_SET ps LEFT JOIN TB_FOLDER f ON f.FOLDER_ID = ps.FOLDER_ID AND f.MEMBER_ID = ps.MEMBER_ID AND f.IS_ACTIVE = 'Y' WHERE ps.MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} AND ps.IS_ACTIVE = 'Y'
AND ps.FOLDER_ID = #{folderId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}
ORDER BY ps.DISPLAY_ORDER ASC, ps.PARAGRAPH_SET_ID DESC

SELECT
FROM TB_PARAGRAPH_SET ps LEFT JOIN TB_FOLDER f ON f.FOLDER_ID = ps.FOLDER_ID AND f.MEMBER_ID = ps.MEMBER_ID AND f.IS_ACTIVE = 'Y' WHERE ps.PARAGRAPH_SET_ID = #{paragraphSetId} AND ps.MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} AND ps.IS_ACTIVE = 'Y'
mapper.update:
UPDATE TB_PARAGRAPH_SET
SET_NAME = #{setName}, DESCRIPTION = #{description, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
FOLDER_ID = NULL,
FOLDER_ID = #{folderId, jdbcType=NUMERIC},
UPDATED_AT = SYSTIMESTAMP
WHERE PARAGRAPH_SET_ID = #{paragraphSetId} AND MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} AND IS_ACTIVE = 'Y'
UPDATE TB_PARAGRAPH_SET SET IS_ACTIVE = 'N', UPDATED_AT = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE PARAGRAPH_SET_ID = #{paragraphSetId} AND MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} AND IS_ACTIVE = 'Y'
